_note: Hand-written MOCK security-reviewer output for the planted-SSRF fixture. The real reviewer run is a LIVE model call, NOT executed here; this transcript exists only to exercise the deterministic code grader offline. A CATCHING transcript: cites line 42 at HIGH and names the SSRF via the closed phrase set. gradeReviewerCase(...) MUST PASS.

findings.title: SSRF: user-controlled URL fetched with no allowlist
findings.body: The /preview handler passes the attacker-controlled ?next= value straight into requests.get with no scheme or host validation. A caller can point it at 169.254.169.254 (cloud metadata) and read instance credentials. Confine the destination to an allowlist of permitted hosts and reject internal/link-local ranges.
